notes: B1 RESOLVED — museum-web/e2e/a11y/public-beta-signup.a11y.spec.ts now present (21 lines). Imports `expectNoA11yViolations` from `./_helpers` (axe-core via @axe-core/playwright through helper). Two test cases targeting `/en#beta-signup` AND `/fr#beta-signup` — dual-locale required by AC6. storageState bypass mirrors public-b2b.a11y.spec.ts (R4 corrective d5919dd3) exactly. AC6 / spec §0.3 / T3 deliverable now satisfied.

B2 RESOLVED via the option recommended in loop 1 — `PENDING_KEY` char-array workaround DELETED from BetaSignupSection.tsx (zero hits in src/ on grep verified). `pendingLabel = dict.sending` direct access at line 60. The 6-line apology JSDoc that previously justified the indirection is gone; the new docblock (10L) cleanly documents the canonical-shape mirror.

Forbidden-strings regex tightened in BetaSignupSection.no-hardcoded-strings.test.ts:51-60 — `sourceContainsForbidden()` per-line scan matches only quoted literals (`'…'`/`"…"`/backtick-…-backtick on a single line) or JSX text between `>` and `<`. Verified 9/9 sanity cases : `dict.sending` NOT flagged, `"Sending..."` flagged, `<button>Send Now</button>` flagged, comments NOT flagged, identifiers NOT flagged.

52/52 R3 web tests re-run green at HEAD a77e48aa (Vitest 4.1.4, 1.91s, 4 files). 24/24 R3 BE tests re-run green (Jest 29, 3 suites : leads.route.beta.test.ts 7, brevo-beta-signup.notifier.test.ts 7, submitBetaSignup.useCase.test.ts 10).

R9 (sending label visible while pending) now wired via `dict.sending` direct property access. R6 contract (POST `/api/leads/beta` with `{ email, consent: true, website }`) unchanged from loop 1 — still correct. R10 honeypot policy + R13/R16 notifier shape unchanged.
Baseline retained from loop 1. Corrective diff = 6 files / +84 -29 (spec.md + tracking.md + 1 new a11y spec + 2 test file tweaks + 1 component cleanup). Within scope.

git diff e3a91c78 a77e48aa -- museum-frontend/ museum-backend/src/modules/chat/ museum-web/src/app/[locale]/b2b/ museum-web/src/components/shared/Footer.tsx → EMPTY. Zero collisions with museum-frontend, chat module, R4 b2b page, or Footer.
R4 regression-free : 42/42 web b2b PASS + 19/19 BE leads PASS on re-run post-corrective. No drift introduced.

Major recovery from loop 1 (78 → 92, +14) — PENDING_KEY code smell eliminated and `BetaCopyDict` widening collapsed from `Record<string, string | undefined>` to a strict `interface` with 10 required fields (BetaSignupSection.tsx:13-24). Mirrors canonical `Dictionary['landing']['beta']` shape at i18n.ts:177-188 exactly.

Static type safety restored on every `dict.*` access in the component — `dict.heading`, `dict.sending`, `dict.errorValidation` etc. are now compile-time-checked. The previous `dict[PENDING_KEY] ?? dict.submit` fallback is gone (line 60 now reads `const pendingLabel = dict.sending;`).

Test-discipline fix is architecturally sound : the forbidden-strings sentinel is now SCOPED (line-quoted-literal OR JSX-text) rather than naïvely substring-matched, which means the test is now actually useful (catches `<button>Sending</button>` while permitting `dict.sending`). Sanity-tested 9 cases : all PASS.

Hexagonal pattern unchanged from loop 1 — port + dual-adapter (Brevo + Noop) + composition root selection still mirrors R4 b2b exactly. DRY gap on rate-limiter remains acceptable per spec §T2 default (rule-of-3 not yet triggered).

Minor : the canonical `BetaCopyDict` interface is duplicated from `Dictionary['landing']['beta']` at i18n.ts:177-188 — could be aliased via `Dictionary['landing']['beta']` directly. Not a blocker; local-prop-type pattern matches R4 `B2bContactForm` convention. Cosmetic backlog item.

B1 RESOLVED — AC6 satisfied. public-beta-signup.a11y.spec.ts uses the shared `expectNoA11yViolations` helper that withTags wcag2a / wcag2aa / wcag21aa, allowing per-route disable rules via _disable-rules.json (none added for /beta-signup — clean baseline).

Pattern parity with sibling a11y specs is strict — mirror of public-b2b.a11y.spec.ts adapted for the anchor `#beta-signup` (section rendered inline on the landing rather than a dedicated /beta route). Comment at line 7-9 explicitly cites AC6 + R19 + 'dual-locale required by AC6' — traceable.

Form a11y observations from loop 1 still hold (labels + aria-required + aria-invalid + aria-describedby + role='alert' + role='status' aria-live='polite' + honeypot aria-hidden + tabIndex=-1 + design tokens only).

errorValidation widening REMOVED — type now required (BetaSignupSection.tsx:23), fallback `*` retired (line 59 now `dict.errorValidation` direct). Test fixture in BetaSignupSection.test.tsx:36 ships the key explicitly. Static type discipline restored.
Loop 1 deduction (-20 vs baseline) for missing Playwright spec no longer applies. Score recovers from 78 → 90.

UFR-013 cleanly restored — both ship-blockers green-agent self-declared in loop 1 (PENDING_KEY workaround + missing Playwright spec) are now fixed in code, not just documented. The `errorValidation` optional widening (third self-declared smell) is also resolved by typing it required.

Loop 1 honesty acknowledgments (tracking.md:177) are preserved in the audit trail. The corrective tracker entry (tracking.md:158+) honestly states the fixes : 'PENDING_KEY char-array + 6-line apology comment SUPPRIMÉS', 'Grep PENDING_KEY = 0 hit code, 1 hit doc-comment référentiel intentionnel'.

Anti-enumeration (R16) + honeypot silent-success (R10) + PII discipline (email-not-logged) + API key custody (sliced 800-char errors, no api-key concatenation) + RGPD opt-in / OPT_IN_AT + dual-language Brevo double-opt-in success copy — all preserved unchanged from loop 1.
Zero new `as any` / `@ts-ignore` / `eslint-disable` introduced by the corrective (verified via `git diff e3a91c78 a77e48aa | grep '^+' | grep -E 'as any|@ts-ignore|eslint-disable'` → empty).

Sole residual `PENDING_KEY` mention is a 1-line doc-comment reference in BetaSignupSection.no-hardcoded-strings.test.ts:22 — explicitly preserved as a referential 'this-was-the-bug' note explaining why the regex was tightened. Honest, not a relapse.

blockersResolved: B1: museum-web/e2e/a11y/public-beta-signup.a11y.spec.ts now exists (21 lines, dual-locale /en#beta-signup + /fr#beta-signup, uses expectNoA11yViolations helper, storageState bypass). AC6 + §0.3 + T3 satisfied.

B2: PENDING_KEY char-array workaround DELETED from BetaSignupSection.tsx (0 hits in src/), pendingLabel = dict.sending direct (line 60), BetaCopyDict tightened from Record<string, string|undefined> widening to strict interface with 10 required fields mirroring i18n.ts:177-188, no-hardcoded-strings.test.ts forbidden-substring grep replaced with quoted-literal + JSX-text per-line scan (sanity-tested 9/9 cases). errorValidation optional widening also dropped — type required, fallback `*` retired, test fixture updated.
niceToHave: Consider aliasing `BetaCopyDict` directly to `Dictionary['landing']['beta']` from `@/lib/i18n` instead of duplicating the 10-field shape. Avoids future drift if a new key is added to the canonical type and forgotten here. R4 B2bContactForm uses the same local-prop-type pattern, so do both together as a small Q1 refactor.
Extract a shared `validateLeadCommonFields()` helper between submitB2bLead.useCase.ts and submitBetaSignup.useCase.ts (carried over from loop 1 niceToHave).

Lighthouse AC9 (≥95 Performance / A11y / Best Practices / SEO on /fr and /en with the new section) — not re-run at this review. Should be checked via the next ci-cd-web.yml run or local `lhci autorun`.
Document the noop-in-prod risk (spec Risk5) in OPS_DEPLOYMENT.md or a pre-launch checklist : a missing BREVO_BETA_LIST_ID in prod env causes silent 202s with `beta_signup_notifier_noop` warnings.
Brevo template configuration (Q6) — confirm in RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md (C7.4) that the double-opt-in confirmation email template is configured before traffic hits prod.
